main.tagline: A local-first voice journal for organizing your thoughts

header.journal_title: Journal (browse, search and cross-discover past entries)

settings.title: Settings
settings.label_refine_style: Refine style (also applied to auto-refine after recording)
settings.auto_pipeline: After stopping, run transcription through refine automatically
settings.taskbar_widget: Show recording widget in the taskbar
settings.mode_toggle: Toggle (press once to start, again to stop)
settings.label_workspace_id: workspace_id (required for Claude Platform on AWS)
settings.label_bedrock_model: Bedrock model ID (region/account dependent, empty for default)
settings.label_aws_session: Session token (only for temporary credentials, optional)
settings.secret_local_note: Secrets are stored on this device (your raw thoughts never leave it).
settings.api_key_refine: {provider} API key (used for refine, stored on device only)
settings.tip_timestamps: Keeps the time of what you said so the AI can organize with the flow in mind.
settings.tip_auto_pipeline: When you stop recording, transcription runs straight through AI refine (a refine provider key is required).
settings.tip_audio_format: Opus is compact and journal-friendly. WAV is uncompressed and reliable but large.

vault.search_placeholder: 🔎 Search body, tags or file name
vault.discovering: AI is reading across your entries…
vault.discover_tip: From the filtered past entries, AI extracts recurring themes, emotional trends, unresolved questions and next steps (requires a refine provider key, up to 30 entries).
vault.discovery_result_tip: Cross-discovery from {n} filtered entries{detail}. Not saved (copy it if you need it).
vault.empty: No entries yet. Recording and refining will save to your journal.

errors.discover_need_two: Cross-discovery needs at least 2 entries (narrow down with tags/search first).
errors.custom_need_both: A custom pattern needs both a name and instructions.
errors.open_output_failed: Could not open the output folder: {detail}
errors.no_audio: No transcribable audio was found (audio was not saved).
